persons.arguments_against: Only the Ceylon stint is this man. Initials F.R., colony Ceylon, the inspector-general of prisons / government-agent offices and the C.M.G./K.C.M.G. all match the entry. The other three stints are same-surname different people (see unassigned).
persons.would_overturn: A second same-surname person serving the same colony in the same years and offices, or a printed birth/death date excluding these years.

unassigned_stints.reason: Frank Saunders, a Jamaica medical officer (Senior Medical Officer, Public Hospital) — a different person; this man was a Ceylon administrator, not a doctor.
R. Saunders, Inspector of Police, South Australia — a different person (different colony, single initial).
Richardson Saunders, Bahamas — a different forename and colony.

notes: production high-value slice batch 2, hand-adjudicated (Claude Code, in-session)
